title: Create: Teleporters
description: Create Teleporters Remastered is a complete rebuild of the original Create Teleporters mod.  Redesigned to fit in more with the new aesthetics of the Create Mod and to be simpler to use. This remastered version fixes old bugs and refines the mechanics.
body:
![Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/829272/description_8efc8180-50e3-4376-b506-1f4629922f24.png)

# Thank you for 4 Million Downloads!
# Remastered Version Out Now!

# Create Teleporters Remastered

**Warning:**  
Upgrading your old world with the new Remastered Version may cause issues with the Custom Portal. On upgrade, your Custom Portal will be replaced with a placeholder block. Just mine that to get the new Custom Portal Base.

[![Kinetic Hosting](https://i.imgur.com/qJhNtVP.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=797)

## Requires Create

A complete rebuild of the original *Create Teleporters* mod. Redesigned to fit in more with the aesthetics of the Create mod and to be simpler to use. This remastered version fixes old bugs and refines the mechanics.

## What's changed?

- No more Teleporter Receivers
- Removed Gravity Stabilizer
- Pets no longer teleport with you
- Cave generation fixed
- Pocket dimensions won't be overridden
- Custom Portal is now a multiblock
- Different sized Entity Teleporters
- No more GeckoLib
- Simplified aesthetics and models
- Connected textures for the Quantum Casing
- New GUIs that match Create’s style
- TP Links (not Advanced TP Links) now have a set range (configurable)

## Entity Teleporters

![Entity Teleporters](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1d4e2f05-2d4c-46ac-89d0-d19a5f04ecd3.png)

## Item Teleporter

![Item Teleporter](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_21cea649-2396-4ada-bdec-37df61f6fc9f.png)

## Custom Portal

Made of a Custom Portal Base and a frame of Quantum Casings.

![Portal Structure](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_c56999ea-8ae6-40fd-9b37-1e4e6e0a15fa.png)

![Custom Portal](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_73d9c7b6-8844-4ee4-95d1-c9b8d908ba72.png)
